request: Plan a planning-only refactor of the Studio Brain capability approval flow so auth and privileged write paths can be reviewed without executing anything.

docket.objective: Produce a secure, reviewable plan for capability approval hardening.
docket.whyNow: The approval flow is expanding and auth assumptions need explicit review before more write paths arrive.
successCriteria: Rollback and dry-run paths are explicit
knownFacts: Pilot write execution is separately gated
unknowns: Whether admin-token enforcement remains sufficient for future write paths

assumptions.statement: Existing auth helpers remain the correct base for planning endpoints.
